title: SAFE PARKING - 211info
text: CHURCH @ THE PARK SAFE PARKING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a site for legal car camping. Garbage disposal facilities and portable restrooms are available to guests. All vehicles must be in working condition. Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Parking: 7pm-7am Email (971) 375-7491 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 375-7491 Main phone Main phone (971) 375-7491 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete form of email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Homeless Safe Parking Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
